title: Arctic Sea Ice Extent: August 1, 2024
summary: August 1, 2024: The Arctic sea ice has continued to decrease this week but at a lesser rate of 8.37% (as opposed to last week’s decrease rate of 10.90%), from the level on 07/25/2024 of 6.811 M km 2 to 6.241 M km 2 for this week. For this time of year, we are now tied at the 2nd lowest amount in the...

title: Public Notice of Decision to Issue Negotiated Land Sale – Fairbanks
summary: MHT 9400815 Notice is hereby given that, pursuant to the provisions of AS 38.05.801 and 11 AAC 99, the Executive Director of the Alaska Mental Health Trust Land Office (TLO) has determined that it is in the best interest of the Alaska Mental Health Trust and its beneficiaries to complete a negotiated land sale of certain Trust land to the United States Army Corps of Engineers.
